text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sigh... An automatic door ignored me again, and Kris S had to take pity and open it for me...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
At stores too, I often have a hard time getting the
staff to notice me... If only I had more of a
presence...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... Trainer, you always take notice of me
and say hello like you did just now, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
U-um, could I ask what it is you look for? If I just
knew that, it might be a hint as to how I could get
others to notice me!
